title: Celebrating the best of Knysna & Plett
description: KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Hosted by Group...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery\n Video","html":"Gallery\n Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Hosted by Group Editors, the annual Best of Knysna & Plett Reader’s Choice Awards lit up Blend Country Restaurant last week as 128 local winners were honoured for their excellence.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS AND VIDEO - Hosted by Group Editors, the annual Best of Knysna & Plett Reader’s Choice Awards lit up Blend Country Restaurant last week as 128 local winners were honoured for their excellence."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Congratulations to all the 2025 category champions - and a big thank you to every nominated business!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2026 awards officially launch in May 2026!","html":"The 2026 awards officially launch in May 2026!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Video supplied:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"list","items":["Your votes, their victory: 2025 Best of Knysna & Plett winners announced"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
